summary: There is emerging evidence suggesting certain lncRNAs may influence neuronal development through indirect pathways related to axonal transport and cellular proliferation. Specifically, lnc-KIF13B-1 and H19 have functional ties to neural health and structural components essential for neuron elongation despite lacking explicit confirmation about directly governing neuronal outgrowth.\boxed{A}
